plane_1 = cq.Plane(origin=(0.0, 0.0, -0.05), normal=(0.0, 0.0, 1.0), xDir=(0.0, 1.0, 0.0))
sketch_1 = cq.Workplane(plane_1)
loop_1 = sketch_1.moveTo(-0.0, -0.0)
loop_1 = loop_1.circle(0.99979)
loop_2 = sketch_1.moveTo(-0.0, -0.0)
loop_2 = loop_2.circle(0.45824)
sketch_1=sketch_1.add(loop_1).add(loop_2)
solid_1 = sketch_1.extrude(0.1)
result = solid_1

loop_1 = loop_1.circle(0.30523)

loop_2 = loop_2.circle(0.19998)
sketch_1=sketch_1.add(loop_1).add(loop_2)
solid_1 = sketch_1.extrude(1.61)
result = solid_1

loop_1 = loop_1.close()
sketch_1=sketch_1.add(loop_1)

result = solid_1

plane_1 = cq.Plane(origin=(0.0, 0.0, -0.83333), normal=(0.0, 0.0, 1.0), xDir=(0.0, 1.0, 0.0))
sketch_1 = cq.Workplane(plane_1)
loop_1 = sketch_1.moveTo(-0.83158, 1.0)
loop_1 = loop_1.lineTo(-0.82693, -1.0)
loop_1 = loop_1.lineTo(0.83158, -0.99537)
loop_1 = loop_1.lineTo(0.82812, 0.16391)
loop_1 = loop_1.lineTo(0.34273, 1.0)
loop_1 = loop_1.lineTo(-0.82926, 1.0)
loop_1 = loop_1.close()
sketch_1=sketch_1.add(loop_1)
solid_1 = sketch_1.extrude(1.67)

result = solid_1

plane_1 = cq.Plane(origin=(-0.12422, 0.08091, -0.0765), normal=(0.0, 0.0, 1.0), xDir=(0.0, 1.0, 0.0))

loop_1 = sketch_1.moveTo(-0.08091, -0.12422)
loop_1 = loop_1.circle(0.99986)
loop_2 = sketch_1.moveTo(-0.08091, -0.09559)
loop_2 = loop_2.circle(0.03713)
sketch_1=sketch_1.add(loop_1).add(loop_2)
solid_1 = sketch_1.extrude(0.15)

result = solid_1

plane_1 = cq.Plane(origin=(0.01285, -1.0, 0.01359), normal=(0.0, 1.0, 0.0), xDir=(1.0, -0.0, 0.0))
sketch_1 = cq.Workplane(plane_1)
loop_1 = sketch_1.moveTo(-0.01285, 0.01359)
loop_1 = loop_1.circle(0.53678)
loop_2 = sketch_1.moveTo(-0.01285, 0.01359)
loop_2 = loop_2.circle(0.40259)
sketch_1=sketch_1.add(loop_1).add(loop_2)
solid_1 = sketch_1.extrude(2.0)

result = solid_1

import math

plane_1 = cq.Plane(origin=(0.0, 0.0, -0.1), normal=(0.0, 0.0, 1.0), xDir=(0.0, 1.0, 0.0))
sketch_1 = cq.Workplane(plane_1)
loop_1 = sketch_1.moveTo(-0.0, -0.0)
loop_1 = loop_1.circle(0.99979)
loop_2 = sketch_1.moveTo(-0.0, -0.0)
loop_2 = loop_2.circle(0.91648)
loop_3 = sketch_1.moveTo(-0.69892, 0.00198)
loop_3 = loop_3.threePointArc((-0.63432, -0.29071), (-0.46172, -0.52117))
loop_3 = loop_3.lineTo(0.10354, -0.51757)
loop_3 = loop_3.lineTo(0.10104, 0.00442)
loop_3 = loop_3.lineTo(-0.10795, 0.00442)
loop_3 = loop_3.lineTo(-0.10795, -0.30859)
loop_3 = loop_3.lineTo(-0.37866, -0.30859)
loop_3 = loop_3.threePointArc((-0.05278, 0.49595), (0.39929, -0.26663))
loop_3 = loop_3.lineTo(0.55189, -0.41856)
loop_3 = loop_3.threePointArc((0.19325, 0.67011), (-0.69893, 0.00439))
loop_3 = loop_3.close()
sketch_1=sketch_1.add(loop_1).add(loop_2).add(loop_3)
solid_1 = sketch_1.extrude(0.19)

result = solid_1
